reasoning: EMOTIONAL (60%): Warm golden-yellow core with bright cyan/blue outer sparks reads as magical and charming rather than violent or scary. The blue-gold palette is immediately Hyrule-coded and evokes classic Zelda impact VFX. Energetic burst silhouette feels toy-diorama playful, not grim. Score ~8/10. TECHNICAL (40%): Pixel grid clearly respected — all particles snap to grid with no sub-pixel bleed. Hard 1px boundaries on every pixel cluster, zero anti-aliasing. Three-tone structure is present: white/pale-yellow hot center, saturated orange mid-ring, cyan outer sparks. Hand-pixeled quality is evident at all zoom levels shown. Matches Denzi-tech reference standard for impact-category VFX in terms of outline discipline and palette restraint. Score ~8/10. Combined: 0.6*8 + 0.4*8 = 8.0. Pass threshold met.
